name: happycodex
description: Lean long-task execution using native Codex planning, dependency-aware read-only scouts, conditional plan challenge, evidence-driven implementation, and final review.

interface.shortDescription: Lean native workflow for complex implementation
interface.longDescription: Complete complex Codex implementation tasks with one Root writer, native plan state, dependency-aware read-only scouts, conditional plan challenge, evidence-driven replanning, tests, Git checkpoints, and final native review.
defaultPrompt: Use $happycodex to complete this long implementation with dependency-aware exploration, conditional plan challenge, and native review.
Use $happycodex with Goal to carry this multi-phase refactor across compaction.
